рқ—ӣрқ—ўрқ—ўрқ——рқ—ңрқ—һ | Providing a secure, self-hosted, and end-to-end encrypted cloud storage solution for individuals and organizations prioritizing data privacy.  рҹ”Ҙ Super Hot!

вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–

рқ—§рқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—ӣ рқ—Ұрқ—§рқ—”рқ—–рқ—һ: рҹҰҖ Rust 
рҹҺҜ рқ—Ёрқ—Ұрқ—ҳ рқ—–рқ—”рқ—Ұрқ—ҳ: Providing a secure, self-hosted, and end-to-end encrypted cloud storage solution for individuals and organizations prioritizing data privacy.
рҹ“… Created: Jan 2023 вҖў Updated: May 2026

вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–вқ–

вңЁ рқ—һрқ—ҳрқ—¬ рқ—ҷрқ—ҳрқ—”рқ—§рқ—Ёрқ—Ҙрқ—ҳрқ—Ұ вңЁ

вң… End-to-end encryption (RSA + AEGIS-128L)
вң… Secure search with tokenized and hashed metadata
вң… Encrypted markdown notes with WYSIWYG editor
вң… Public sharing links with secure key management
вң… Two-factor authentication (TOTP)
вң… Admin dashboard for user and settings management
вң… Chunked transfers for efficient upload/download
вң… Support for SQLite and PostgreSQL
вң… S3-compatible storage backend integration
вң… Docker-first deployment with multi-arch images

вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ 1.2K рқҳҖрқҳҒрқ—®рқ—ҝрқҳҖ
рҹҚҙ 47 рқ—ірқ—јрқ—ҝрқ—ёрқҳҖ
рҹ”Қ 7 рқ—јрқ—Ҫрқ—Ірқ—» рқ—¶рқҳҖрқҳҖрқҳӮрқ—ІрқҳҖ

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Hoodik is a self-hosted, end-to-end encrypted cloud storage server built with Rust and Vue.js. It prioritizes user privacy by performing all encryption and decryption in the browser, ensuring the server never accesses plaintext data. The system supports secure file storage, encrypted notes, searchable metadata, and various backend storage options.

рҹ“қ рқ—”рқ—•рқ—ўрқ—Ёрқ—§ рқ—§рқ—ӣрқ—ңрқ—Ұ рқ—Јрқ—Ҙрқ—ўрқ—қрқ—ҳрқ—–рқ—§

Headless Terminal (ht) allows you to programmatically control terminal-based applications (TUIs) like vim, emacs, or htop. It provides a Go CLI and a daemon that manages pseudo-terminals, enabling scripting, testing, and automation of interactive command-line interfaces.

PentAGI is an open-source, autonomous AI agent system designed for automated penetration testing. It leverages a multi-agent architecture and integrates professional security tools within a sandboxed environment to discover and exploit vulnerabilities.

вң… Code on the go from any device

This Python-based Telegram bot provides remote access to Claude Code, allowing users to interact with their codebase conversationally from anywhere. It supports session persistence, proactive notifications, and secure access, making AI-assisted code analysis and modification convenient on the go.
